title: Much Better MC
description: Just another better vanilla expiriance modpack
body:
This modpack is focused on easy use, good preformace, and well balanced expiriance.
It is more lightweight than other couterparts, but packs a extremly good expiriance.
This modpack reworks almost every aspect of minecraft.
For example: world generation, enchanting, completly reworked nether and end, bether viliges and structures and more.
It sounds like a lot of stuff whitc it is, but unlike some other modpacks it dosent feel like a content bomb as soon as you load the world.
It is made for good singleplayer expiriance as well as for multiplayer and pvp combat.
